description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check autogenerated files that runs on pull requests affecting specific files. The workflow should have read-only repository permissions and consist of three ubuntu-latest jobs: pkgrefs-check to test .json templates, eboot-check to verify eboot .elf files, and boards-txt-check to validate boards.txt.py. Each job checks out the repository, and some jobs set up Python 3.x and use caching.
